title: seseli montanum var. polyphyllum
intro: Seseli montanum var. polyphyllum, also known as Mountain Seseli, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and carminative effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues and relieving pain. The health benefits of Mountain Seseli include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and other spasmodic conditions. Herbal preparations of Seseli montanum var. polyphyllum often include its dried roots, leaves, and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
